name: diffdock
tagline: Guides DiffDock/DiffDock-L molecular docking: env setup, single/batch pose prediction, confidence scoring, troubleshooting.
verdict: Clean scientific-workflow skill: no secret access, no data exfiltration, no hidden instructions, and it explicitly states what it is and is not for (docking poses, not binding affinity). Only real risk is standard supply-chain exposure: it has the agent `git clone` an unpinned upstream repo and `docker pull` an image by floating tag rather than a pinned comm

highlights.summary: Installation instructs `git clone https://github.com/gcorso/DiffDock.git` (no commit/tag pin) and `docker pull rbgcsail/diffdock` (no digest pin) — a user re-running this later could silently get diff
